articles.title_en: Weimob Posts $14M+ AI Revenue, Bets on Agent-First SaaS
articles.title_zh: 微盟AI收入破亿，押注 Agent+Skills 重构 B 端 SaaS
articles.content_en: At its Shanghai City Summit on April 22, Weimob disclosed that its AI-related revenue crossed 100 million RMB for the first time in 2025, with H2 growth running at 130% half-on-half. The company is repositioning AI from a bolt-on feature to its core business layer via an 'Agent+Skills' architecture, where conversational agents surface SaaS functions merchants previously navigated through deep menus. The B2B caveat is real: Weimob's tech VP noted that even one bad case leads enterprise clients to write off an entire AI module, a much harsher standard than consumer tolerance for hallucination.
articles.content_zh: 微盟在4月22日上海城市峰会上披露，2025年AI业务收入首次突破亿元，下半年环比增速达130%。公司通过"Agent+Skills"架构将AI从辅助插件升级为业务底座，商家可直接对话调取交易数据，无需多级菜单。技术副总裁肖锋指出，B端客户零容忍 hallucination：一个 bad case 就能让客户判定整个AI模块不可用。
articles.so_what_en: If you sell AI tools to B2B clients, define a 'bad case' threshold before launch. Build a failure-case library, run it in UAT, and make your accuracy SLA visible in sales materials.
articles.so_what_zh: 向 B 端卖 AI 工具前，先定义"bad case"阈值，建失败案例库并在 UAT 中跑通，把准确率 SLA 写进销售材料。

articles.title_en: Buzzy Raises $20M for Natural-Language Video Editing Agent
articles.title_zh: 感知阶跃融资2000万美元，Buzzy 做视频局部精修 Agent
articles.content_en: Buzzy, a video editing agent from the Redpoint-backed startup Ganzhi Jiejue and funded in a $20M round, lets creators issue natural-language commands to swap backgrounds, correct lighting, and replace products in existing footage without regenerating the full clip. The company, already at $20M ARR, targets small merchants and content creators who find canvas-based AI editors too complex and template-based tools too rigid. Founder Ella Zhang previously led product on Apple's original AirPods team and worked as a Google AR systems architect.
articles.content_zh: 感知阶跃旗下视频编辑 Agent 平台 Buzzy 近期完成超2000万美元融资，领投方为 Redpoint。产品支持自然语言指令对视频局部精修，包括换背景、修光线、替换产品，无需重新生成整段视频。公司 ARR 已达2000万美元，定位介于画布型工具与预制 workflow 模板之间的空缺。
articles.so_what_en: Test Buzzy for product-swap and background-replacement in e-commerce creative iterations. It targets the exact pain point of retouching without full regeneration.
articles.so_what_zh: 电商团队可测试 Buzzy 做产品换背景、换色系的创意迭代，替代逐帧重生成的低效流程。

articles.title_en: DeepSeek Releases New Flagship Model One Year After V3 Shock
articles.title_zh: DeepSeek 发布新旗舰模型，距 V3 震动市场整一年
articles.content_en: DeepSeek unveiled a new flagship model on April 24, approximately one year after its open-weight V3 release forced a revaluation of AI infrastructure costs across Silicon Valley. Bloomberg reported the launch without releasing benchmark details at publication time. The cadence confirms DeepSeek as a standing competitive pressure on pricing and capability expectations for closed-source model vendors.
articles.content_zh: DeepSeek 于4月24日发布新旗舰模型，距其开源 V3 引发行业重估整一年。Bloomberg 报道了发布消息，但截至发稿时尚无详细 benchmark 数据。DeepSeek 的持续迭代已成为封闭模型厂商在定价和能力预期上的常态竞争压力。

articles.title_en: Possible 2026 Scales to Eden Roc With Invite-Only, Creator Tracks
articles.title_zh: Possible 2026 扩至 Eden Roc，设邀请制和创作者专属议程
articles.content_en: Marketing conference Possible is expanding its 2026 edition beyond the Fontainebleau to Eden Roc, adding invite-only C-suite programming alongside creator and AI tracks as it positions itself as the marketing-world equivalent of Davos. The move signals that AI and creator economy programming is now table-stakes for premium industry events. No ticket pricing or specific speaker details were disclosed at publication.
articles.content_zh: 营销峰会 Possible 2026 将从 Fontainebleau 扩展至 Eden Roc，新增邀请制 C-suite 论坛及创作者、AI 专题议程，对标 Davos 定位。这表明 AI 与创作者经济议题已成为顶级营销活动的标配内容。目前票价与嘉宾名单尚未公布。
articles.so_what_en: If your brand targets senior marketers, Possible 2026 is now a deal-flow event worth a C-suite presence, not just a content-discovery trip.
articles.so_what_zh: 若品牌目标客群是高级营销决策者，Possible 2026 已升级为 C-suite 决策场合，值得安排高管出席而非仅派团队旁听。

articles.title_en: Sports Marketers Warn Against Over-Indexing on AI in Fan Campaigns
articles.title_zh: 体育营销从业者警告：AI 过度介入球迷活动风险不容忽视
articles.content_en: Agencies building sports marketing practices are recruiting ex-league talent and cautioning brands against deploying AI across too many fan touchpoints simultaneously. The concern: over-automation can hollow out the emotional authenticity that drives sports fandom and brand affinity. The piece offers no campaign-level data but reflects a practitioner consensus emerging across agency strategy teams.
articles.content_zh: 进军体育营销的代理商正从大型联盟引入专业人才，同时警告品牌不要在球迷触点上全线铺开 AI。核心担忧是过度自动化会削弱体育粉丝文化赖以维系品牌情感的真实性。文章无具体数据支撑，但反映了代理商策略层的普遍共识。
articles.so_what_en: Map which fan touchpoints are emotionally high-stakes before automating. Reserve human voice for peak moments; use AI for logistics and pre/post-game content.
articles.so_what_zh: 上线 AI 前先标注哪些球迷触点情感权重最高，把人工声音留给高峰时刻，AI 处理赛前赛后内容与后勤信息。

articles.title_en: Musk vs. Altman Trial Starts April 27 — OpenAI Brand Risk Watch
articles.title_zh: Musk 诉 Altman 案4月27日开庭，OpenAI 品牌风险窗口开启
articles.content_en: A trial between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over alleged OpenAI fraud is scheduled to begin in Oakland on April 27. Legal theories have ranged from breach of contract to false advertising. For marketers, the proceeding creates a near-term brand-safety window: AI vendor narratives around OpenAI could be destabilized by courtroom disclosures, affecting enterprise procurement conversations.
articles.content_zh: Musk 就 OpenAI 涉嫌欺诈提起的诉讼将于4月27日在奥克兰开庭，诉由涵盖违约及虚假广告等。对营销决策者来说，庭审信息披露可能在短期内冲击 OpenAI 品牌叙事，影响企业客户的 AI 供应商选型对话。
articles.so_what_en: Flag April 27 on your vendor-review calendar. If you have OpenAI in a client-facing pitch, prepare a one-paragraph contingency on multi-vendor strategy.
articles.so_what_zh: 在供应商评估日历上标记4月27日。若 OpenAI 出现在客户提案中，提前准备一段多供应商备选说明。

articles.title_en: Ethan Mollick: GPT-5.5 Is a Preview of What's Coming Fast
articles.title_zh: Ethan Mollick：GPT-5.5 是接下来变化的预告片
articles.content_en: Wharton professor Ethan Mollick argues in his April 23 post that GPT-5.5 is less about the model itself and more about the pace: each step on the capability curve is arriving faster than practitioners expect. He stresses that the gap between 'impressive demo' and 'production workflow' is shrinking to weeks, not quarters. Marketers who wait for a 'stable' AI environment before updating their workflows are already behind.
articles.content_zh: 沃顿商学院教授 Ethan Mollick 在 4 月 23 日的文章中指出，GPT-5.5 本身不是重点，重点是能力曲线的迭代速度已超出大多数从业者的预期。他认为从'令人印象深刻的演示'到'可投入生产的工作流'之间的窗口期已缩短至数周而非数季度。等待 AI 环境'稳定'后再调整工作流的营销人，实际上已经落后了。
articles.so_what_en: Set a 30-day review cadence for your AI-assisted workflows. If a tool or prompt hasn't been updated in 60 days, treat it as deprecated.
articles.so_what_zh: 把 AI 工作流的复盘周期设为 30 天。超过 60 天未更新的 prompt 或工具，直接视为过期。

articles.title_en: DeepSeek-V4 Ships 1M-Token Context for Production Agents
articles.title_zh: DeepSeek-V4 上线百万 token context window，面向 agent 实战
articles.content_en: DeepSeek released V4 with a 1-million-token context window, published via Hugging Face. The jump makes it viable for agent workflows that need to ingest large documents, codebases, or conversation histories in a single pass — where previous context limits forced chunking workarounds. The model is open-weight and available on Hugging Face today.
articles.content_zh: DeepSeek 在 Hugging Face 发布 V4，context window 扩展至 100 万 token。这一跨度让需要一次性摄取长文档、大型代码库或超长对话历史的 agent 工作流变得可行，此前的 context 限制迫使开发者依赖分块方案。模型为 open-weight，现已在 Hugging Face 上线。
articles.so_what_en: If your martech stack uses RAG to patch context limits, test V4's 1M window first — it may let you drop retrieval middleware and cut pipeline complexity.
articles.so_what_zh: 如果你的技术栈依赖 RAG 补丁绕过 context 限制，先测 V4 的百万 token 窗口，可能直接省掉 retrieval 中间层，降低流水线复杂度。

articles.title_en: Browser Harness: Give LLMs Direct Control Over Chrome
articles.title_zh: Browser Harness：让 LLM 直接掌控 Chrome，去掉框架束缚
articles.content_en: browser-use, makers of the popular Browser Use library, shipped Browser Harness on Show HN. It strips away deterministic browser framework heuristics and hands the LLM raw control over Chrome via CDP websocket, letting the model self-correct and add new tools on the fly. Early show HN post scored 27 points with 6 comments.
articles.content_zh: Browser Use 团队在 Show HN 发布 Browser Harness。它移除了原有的确定性启发式框架层，通过 CDP websocket 让 LLM 直接控制 Chrome，支持自我纠错并在运行中动态添加新工具。Show HN 首发获 27 分、6 条评论。
articles.so_what_en: Marketing teams building browser-based scraping or competitor-monitoring agents should test Harness as a lower-overhead alternative to wrapped browser frameworks.
articles.so_what_zh: 在构建竞品监控或网页抓取 agent 的团队可以测试 Harness，用它替换现有的框架封装层，降低维护成本。

articles.title_en: China's 2025 Digital Reading Report: Mobile Reads 5x Print
articles.title_zh: 手机阅读时长是纸书5倍,品牌如何卡位碎片场景
articles.content_en:
## Background & Numbers
China's 2025 Digital Reading Report shows adult digital reading penetration at 80.8%, with daily mobile reading averaging 100.47 minutes — nearly 5x the time spent on print. Over 60% of users want personalized content matched to specific contexts (commute, lunch break, pre-sleep).

## Breakdown
1. **Commute and meal-break windows are the real prime time.** Audio podcasts and short-form feeds dominate fragmented slots — not long-form articles.
2. **Multi-modal beats single-format.** Users who listen to books or watch video summaries are growing; text-only campaigns miss this audience.
3. **Personalization is the loyalty driver.** 60%+ users demand scene-matched content, meaning one-size newsletter blasts underperform.

## How to Apply
- [ ] Repurpose brand content into sub-3-minute commute audio clips
- [ ] Design a dedicated short-form visual push for the lunch-break window
- [ ] A/B test video-explainer format vs. long-form article and compare retention rates
articles.content_zh:
## 背景与数据
《2025年度中国数字阅读报告》显示,成年国民数字化阅读接触率达80.8%,手机阅读日均100.47分钟,是纸质书的近5倍。超过60%的用户要求内容与使用场景精准匹配。

## 问题拆解
1. **通勤与午休才是真正黄金时段** 播客和碎片图文主导这两段窗口,长文内容基本无缘。
2. **多模态内容覆盖面更广** 听书、视频讲书用户持续增长,纯文字推送正在丢失这部分受众。
3. **个性化是留存关键** 60%用户要求场景适配,统一格式的推送打开率只会越来越低。

## 你可以怎么用
- [ ] 把品牌内容剪成3分钟通勤音频版
- [ ] 针对午休场景单独设计短图文推送
- [ ] A/B test 视频讲解版与长文版的留存差异
articles.so_what_en: Segment content by daily time slot, not just topic.
articles.so_what_zh: 按用户时间段切内容,比按话题切更有效。
